name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - Timeline Follow Status v54
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version adds a lightweight timeline detail context row: followed state plus one-line tracking direction before the stats row, without changing node reading structure or business rules.

topicCard.dateAlignment: same row as latest-update summary box, measured after layout
topicCard.directionText: tertiary, softer gray, smaller size, lower weight
topicCard.latestNodeMessage: primary, stronger weight with soft highlight
topicCard.textAlignment: direction text and latest node message share the same left text start

directionCopy.intent: Keep tracking direction readable but visually behind titles and latest node messages across Following and Recommendation cards

textRightEdge.myFollowing: topic text column aligns to baseline
textRightEdge.timeline: node title and summary use a stable 248px reading lane reserved away from the chevron

timelineChevron.textRule: .timeline .node h3, .timeline .node p { width: min(248px, calc(100% - 21px)); text-wrap: wrap; }

timelineNodeCard.contentAnchor: date chip, title, and summary keep their previous screen x position

timelineDateChip.normal: .timeline .node .node-date { background: #fff; border: 2px solid rgba(127, 198, 62, .62); color: var(--theme-deep); }
timelineDateChip.intent: Date chip color matches the left rail count-dot status

latestNodeRail.intent: Signal the latest timeline node without changing card content

railVerticalAlignment.unchanged: count dots, date chips, cards, horizontal connectors, text

timelineFollowStatus.direction: one-line muted tracking direction with ellipsis
timelineFollowStatus.intent: Show whether the current timeline is followed and what direction it tracks without adding reading density

followingReadableCards.latestUpdate: two-line soft update strip, higher weight than direction copy
followingReadableCards.unread: reduced red area, unread signal remains dot plus highlighted latest update
followingReadableCards.intent: Lower perceived density while preserving the same topic title, direction, date, and latest update information

bottomTimelineTab.replacement: clock icon in the second bottom tab
bottomTimelineTab.size: selected and unselected both 52px mark inside 58px by 52px wrap
bottomTimelineTab.alignment: icon top aligns with the My Following selected icon top; icon bottom aligns with the My Following label bottom

recommendationCard.typeChip: removed from card; category remains in top tab
recommendationCard.followedState: moved under the existing left icon
